exercises.exerciseTypeName: A: Complete using the words in the box
exercises.title: A: Complete using the words in the box
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences using the words in the box.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete the sentences using the words in the box.

items.sentence: The island has a ...... climate, so tourists visit all year.
The water in the lake is ...... today!
Some rare birds may become ...... if we don't protect them.
Plastic pollution is a ...... issue, not just a local one.
We saw several ...... horses running across the hills.
The ...... council wants to plant more trees in the town.

exercises.title: B: Word formation
exercises.instructions: Complete by changing the form of the word in capitals.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete by changing the form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: The road was dangerous because it was very ...... (FOG).
A large fire can be extremely ...... (DESTROY).
It is ...... (NATURE) for animals to look for food.
Water ...... (POLLUTE) is killing fish in the river.
My grandfather enjoys ...... (GARDEN) at the weekend.
Nobody knows the exact ...... (DEEP) of that cave.
The path around the lake is almost ...... (CIRCLE).
Some insects are ...... (DANGER) to small animals.

exercises.title: C: Key Word Transformation
exercises.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
No more than twenty people can enter the cave. **most**
Twenty people ...... can enter the cave.

In the story, the spaceship explodes near the moon. **up**
In the story, the spaceship ...... near the moon.

There are unusual plants on the lowest part of the valley. **bottom**
There are unusual plants ...... the valley.
items.explanation: Lowest part → **at the bottom of** the valley.

items.sentence:
The candle stopped burning before midnight. **out**
The candle ...... before midnight.

Can you help me hang this wildlife poster? **up**
Can you help me ...... this wildlife poster?

We should increase support for recycling in schools. **build**
We should ...... support for recycling in schools.

exercises.title: E: Complete the sentences
exercises.instructions: Write one word in each gap.
exercises.studentInstruction: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: The rainforest contains millions of different ...... of plants and insects.
Rising sea ...... may affect many coastal cities.
Everyone should help protect ...... planet.
The earthquake was 6.8 on the Richter ......
The volcano ...... after many years of silence.
Several animals are now ...... because their habitats disappeared.
The river ...... its banks during the storm.
Some scientists say the universe is nearly 14 ...... years old.
